content.query:
-- TABLE 1: stg_products

CREATE TABLE stg_products (
    product_id              SMALLINT,
    title                   NVARCHAR(255),
    description             NVARCHAR(1000),
    category                NVARCHAR(100),
    brand                   NVARCHAR(100),
    sku                     NVARCHAR(50),
    price                   FLOAT,
    discount_percentage     FLOAT,
    rating                  FLOAT,
    stock                   SMALLINT,
    availability_status     NVARCHAR(50),
    minimum_order_quantity  SMALLINT,
    weight                  SMALLINT,
    depth                   FLOAT,
    height                  FLOAT,
    width                   FLOAT,
    warranty_information    NVARCHAR(100),
    shipping_information    NVARCHAR(100),
    return_policy           NVARCHAR(100),
    barcode                 NVARCHAR(50),
    thumbnail               NVARCHAR(500),
    created_at              NVARCHAR(50),
    updated_at              NVARCHAR(50),
    load_date               DATE,
    source_system           NVARCHAR(50),
    hash_key                NVARCHAR(64)
)
WITH (
    DISTRIBUTION = ROUND_ROBIN,
    HEAP
);

-- TABLE 2: master_products

CREATE TABLE master_products (
    product_id              SMALLINT        NOT NULL,
    title                   NVARCHAR(255),
    description             NVARCHAR(1000),
    category                NVARCHAR(100),
    brand                   NVARCHAR(100),
    sku                     NVARCHAR(50),
    price                   FLOAT,
    discount_percentage     FLOAT,
    rating                  FLOAT,
    stock                   SMALLINT,
    availability_status     NVARCHAR(50),
    minimum_order_quantity  SMALLINT,
    weight                  SMALLINT,
    depth                   FLOAT,
    height                  FLOAT,
    width                   FLOAT,
    warranty_information    NVARCHAR(100),
    shipping_information    NVARCHAR(100),
    return_policy           NVARCHAR(100),
    barcode                 NVARCHAR(50),
    thumbnail               NVARCHAR(500),
    created_at              NVARCHAR(50),
    updated_at              NVARCHAR(50),
    load_date               DATE,
    source_system           NVARCHAR(50),
    hash_key                NVARCHAR(64),
    dw_created_date         DATETIME,
    dw_modified_date        DATETIME
)
WITH (
    DISTRIBUTION = HASH(product_id),
    CLUSTERED COLUMNSTORE INDEX
);


-- TABLE 3 dim_category

CREATE TABLE dim_category (
    category_key        INT             NOT NULL,
    category_name       NVARCHAR(100)   NOT NULL,
    created_date        DATETIME
)
WITH (
    DISTRIBUTION = REPLICATE,
    CLUSTERED COLUMNSTORE INDEX
);


-- TABLE 4: dim_brand

CREATE TABLE dim_brand (
    brand_key           INT             NOT NULL,
    brand_name          NVARCHAR(100)   NOT NULL,
    created_date        DATETIME
)
WITH (
    DISTRIBUTION = REPLICATE,
    CLUSTERED COLUMNSTORE INDEX
);


-- TABLE 5: fact_product_pricing

CREATE TABLE fact_product_pricing (
    fact_id             INT             NOT NULL,
    product_id          SMALLINT        NOT NULL,
    category_key        INT,
    brand_key           INT,
    price               FLOAT,
    discount_percentage FLOAT,
    discounted_price    FLOAT,
    stock               SMALLINT,
    rating              FLOAT,
    load_date           DATE,
    pipeline_run_date   DATETIME
)
WITH (
    DISTRIBUTION = HASH(product_id),
    CLUSTERED COLUMNSTORE INDEX
);

-- TABLE 6: audit_log

CREATE TABLE audit_log (
    audit_id            NVARCHAR(64)    NOT NULL,
    table_name          NVARCHAR(100)   NOT NULL,
    records_read        INT,
    records_inserted    INT,
    records_updated     INT,
    rows_affected       INT,
    error_message       NVARCHAR(500),
    load_timestamp      DATETIME
)
WITH (
    DISTRIBUTION = ROUND_ROBIN,
    HEAP
);
